channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses (1312 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yjeanrenaud

📝 Repository: yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses

📄 Descrizione: attempting to detect smart glasses nearby and warn you

⭐ Stelle: 1312

🍴 Forks: 55

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-app meta privacy privacy-protection ray-ban-meta-smart-glasses self-defense smartglasses smartphone

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T13:56:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T03:53:59Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android (207 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Natfii

📝 Repository: Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android

📄 Descrizione: Run AI agents 24/7 on your Android phone. Native Rust core, 25+ providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, Ollama), encrypted key storage, plugin browser, Material You UI. Self-hosted alternative to Mac Mini setups. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 207

🍴 Forks: 34

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agent-framework android anthropic deepseek encrypted-storage gemini grok iot jetpack-compose kotlin llm material-you mqtt ollama openai openclaw rust self-hosted zeroclaw

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T01:20:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T01:27:15Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 xigua222/photoo (165 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xigua222

📝 Repository: xigua222/photoo

📄 Descrizione: photoo 是一款 Android 原生的极简照片整理工具。滑动卡片就能快速整理相册——左滑删除，右滑收藏，上滑保留。还有一系列"该有的全都有"的功能：相册分析生成专属摄影画像、沉浸式回顾喜爱照片、智能识别相似照片和低质量图片、视频和图片压缩...... 但 photoo 不只是一个"清理"软件，它更是"回忆"。

⭐ Stelle: 165

🍴 Forks: 2

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T13:30:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T00:59:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Doryoku1223

📝 Repository: Doryoku1223/TabulaV3

📄 Descrizione: Tabula V3 - 极简相册整理工具 | Tinder风格卡片交互，单手滑动整理照片。100%本地处理，免费无广告，隐私安全。

⭐ Stelle: 144

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android free jetpack-compose kotlin material-design photo-cleaner photo-manager photo-organizer

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: kdroidFilter/Nucleus

item.title: 📝 fzer0x/SentryRadio (37 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: fzer0x

📝 Repository: fzer0x/SentryRadio

📄 Descrizione: A professional Android forensic tool designed to detect, analyze, and map cellular network anomalies, including potential IMSI Catchers (Stingrays), cell site simulators, and suspicious network downgrades and Silent SMS.

⭐ Stelle: 37

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-root android-security root xposed xposed-framework

📜 Licenza: GNU General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-05T11:48:43Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-03T09:35:04Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
